label: Generate Proposal
description: Draft a client proposal with the proposal-generator skill and save it to Google Docs.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.label: Client / project brief
inputs.placeholder: Who the client is, what they need, budget/timeline if known...

label: Upwork Proposal
description: Turn a pasted Upwork job post into a ready-to-send proposal (upwork-proposal-generator skill).

label: Quick Website Audit
description: Quick-mode audit of a prospect site (website-audit-system): top findings + outreach hook email.
prompt_template:
Use the website-audit-system skill (.claude/skills/website-audit-system/SKILL.md) in QUICK mode to audit this website: {url}

Follow the skill's quick-mode workflow (homepage-level analysis, 3-5 findings, hook email). Run fully autonomously - do not ask questions. If the skill saves a Google Doc, end your final message with the Doc link on its own line; otherwise output the findings and the outreach email in full.
